author.name: Gyan Prakash Sahu
author.bio: A poet and observer of the quiet moments between heartbeats. I write to capture the fleeting beauty of nature and human connection.

poems.title: Convos
text: Can we discuss something new?,
I'm tired of those repetitive convos
Of incidents that you twist before you tell
Use you're imagination to fill the vague details
Desperation that you show or the feelings that you hide
Everything's dissected in crazy details
Personal problems that you bestowed to you're bestie
Has become a communal topic to make the talk tasty
Can we discuss something new?
Apart from why she ditched him,
Or who's she seeing now
Cause I'm tired of these repetitive convos

poems.title: Song of the rain
text: Droplets of rain,
Why so pitter-patter?
Don't you like the ride down to earth?,
Is the air too pushy to change you're direction?
Do the disputes between cloudes settle?
Or do they still disturb you with thier thuderous quarrels?
Does your'e heart skip a just like mine,
when the lightning strikes?
Or are you not afraid of them?
Does the city looks beautiful up from the sky?
Does the journey ahead excite you?
Or are you missing you're home?
